originalTitle: Belgium detains three suspected Cameroon separatists in war crimes probe
title: Belgium detains three suspected Cameroon separatists in war crimes probe
content: Money is reportedly being raised by them for the armed struggle, prosecutors say.

originalTitle: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
title: US sanctions Rwanda's military and top commanders over fighting in DR Congo
content: Rwanda accused Washington's move as “one sided” and politically motivated.

originalTitle: Anglican divisions deepen as rebel clerics pick rival to first female leader
title: Anglican divisions deepen as rebel clerics pick rival to first female leader
content: Conservative clerics are meeting in Nigeria to choose a rival to the first female Archbishop of Canterbury.

originalTitle: Iran warns European countries from joining the war
title: Iran warns European countries from joining the war
content: Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman has warned European countries against joining the ongoing war with Israel and the US.

originalTitle: NATO Chief welcomes Iran leader’s death
title: NATO Chief welcomes Iran leader’s death
content: NATO Chief Mark Rutte says the world is “better off” with Iran’s Supreme Leader gone.

originalTitle: UAE tennis tournament suspended after drone interception sparks fire
title: UAE tennis tournament suspended after drone interception sparks fire
content: Falling debris from a drone interception prompts halt to play at the Fujairah Challenger event on the UAE's Gulf coast.

originalTitle: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
title: Gas and oil prices soar and shares tumble on fears conflict could escalate
content: Markets react as the conflict in the Middle East intensifies and concerns grow over how long it will last.

originalTitle: Battered and isolated, Hezbollah drags Lebanon into another war
title: Battered and isolated, Hezbollah drags Lebanon into another war
content: Its attack on Israel in support of Iran has led to fresh mass displacements and Israeli bombing, to the fury of many Lebanese.

originalTitle: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
title: Six US soldiers killed in Iranian strike on Kuwait base
content: The US defence secretary confirms a US military base was hit by Iran on Sunday.

title: Haaland? Kane? R9? Ranking the best centre-forwards this century
content: Who are the best centre-forwards of the 21st Century? We've had a go at trying to whittle down a pretty formidable list.

content: In defence of Arsenal - BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty asks whether criticism of the Premier League leaders is unfair as they chase four trophies.

originalTitle: England squad not 'political spokespeople' - PFA chief
title: England squad not 'political spokespeople' - PFA chief
content: England's players are worried about being turned into "political spokespeople" at the World Cup, the chief executive of the Professional Footballers' Association says.
